evidence: "I'm a huge horror movie fan & no one can deny that these 4 are true classics."
"I love this show, it’s a classic, I especially enjoy watching it around Halloween."
"Overall, it was not fantastic, I understand why it was cancelled, it’s your average teen-drama high school show with nothing overly special to offer."
"It’s a real shame that the show went on as long as it did though."
"I really enjoyed this show all the way from season 1-4, they did a good job; it was mindless entertainment & held my attention."
"It’s a tad long, but overall it’s entertaining, it has a creepy premise which holds your attention."
"The picture & sound quality is good, I have watched each episode & haven’t had any issues with any discs."
"The quality is great, the sound, the picture, everything is awesome."
"I personally preferred the actors performances in the 1978 version, but again, that's just my opinion."
"I’ve seen some of the remakes & I’m not a fan, the original is by far the best!"
"Watching the Silly Symphonies really takes you back, it's so much fun to watch them again."
"The movie itself is creepy & disturbing, it’s raw & feels quite real."
"I love this movie, it's fantastic, I've watched it so many times I've lost count."
"It deals with real family issues & is something that younger people can relate to (12+)."

summary: The user has a strong preference for horror and family-oriented content, often enjoying nostalgic and visually engaging experiences. They appreciate emotional depth in storytelling but tend to favor simpler narratives and slower pacing, indicating a preference for character-driven stories over complex plots.
